CREATE CONSTRAINT hall_partnerId IF NOT EXISTS
FOR (h:Hall) REQUIRE h.partnerId IS UNIQUE;

CREATE CONSTRAINT benefit_uuid IF NOT EXISTS
FOR (b:Benefit) REQUIRE b.uuid IS UNIQUE;

CREATE CONSTRAINT image_url IF NOT EXISTS
FOR (i:Image) REQUIRE i.url IS UNIQUE;

CREATE CONSTRAINT region_name IF NOT EXISTS
FOR (r:Region) REQUIRE r.name IS UNIQUE;

CREATE CONSTRAINT district_name IF NOT EXISTS
FOR (d:District) REQUIRE d.name IS UNIQUE;

CREATE CONSTRAINT event_code IF NOT EXISTS
FOR (e:EventTag) REQUIRE e.code IS UNIQUE;

CREATE CONSTRAINT style_id IF NOT EXISTS
FOR (s:StyleFilter) REQUIRE s.id IS UNIQUE;
